## 验证结果

- [ ] 已按改动范围完成本地验证
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd web && pnpm build`
- [ ] `cd admin && pnpm build`
- [ ] `make migrate-up && make migrate-status`
- [ ] GitHub Actions CI 通过
